name: Easy Eclair Dessert
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces reduced fat milk chocolate frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange 3/4 cup of the graham cracker crumbs on bottom of a 13 x 9-inch pan.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine milk and vanilla pudding mix. Beat with a wire whisk for 2 minutes.
3. Gently stir in Cool Whip® Free, thawed. Spread pudding mixture over graham cracker crumbs.
4. Place remaining graham cracker crumbs over the pudding.
5. Remove top and foil from frosting container. Microwave frosting in the container on high for 1 minute or until pourable.
6. Spread evenly over cracker crumbs.
7. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
